seo.og_title: 107 Cypress Lake Dr, Youngsville, LA 70592 — For Sale $510,750
seo.og_description: Single-Family — 4 bed / 3 bath / 2,250 sq ft. Offered at $510,750. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: A 2025-built residence where geometry, light, and marble meet in Youngsville's Cypress Lake enclave.
overview_paragraphs: Completed in 2025, this four-bedroom, three-bath residence spans 2,250 square feet of single-level living behind a crisp white stucco and brick facade. Geometric massing, a gray tile roof, and black-trimmed glass doors set a restrained, architectural tone from the driveway to the covered porch.

Inside, the plan opens. Light wood cabinetry, wood flooring, and floor-to-ceiling windows draw the surrounding trees into an open-concept kitchen and living space, where a marble island with a waterfall edge anchors the room beneath a run of pendant lights. A living area fireplace, framed by a natural wood mantel, gives the gathering space its center.

Beyond the glass sliders, a covered patio under a wooden vaulted ceiling extends the living space outdoors, complete with a fireplace, an outdoor kitchen, and a lawn framed by mature trees and a quiet water view.
copy.pull_quote: Marble, light wood, and glass compose a home that feels both current and calm.

feature_groups.title: Kitchen & Living
items: Open-concept kitchen and living area with wood flooring and floor-to-ceiling windows
Marble island with waterfall edge, light wood and white cabinetry, and a black range hood
White subway tile backsplash, farmhouse sink, and stainless steel appliances
Living room fireplace with a natural wood mantel

feature_groups.title: Primary Suite & Baths
items: Spa-like primary bath with a freestanding oval soaking tub and dual marble vanities
Walk-in shower with rainfall showerhead, hand-held spray, and body jets
Marble tile walls and flooring with arched ceiling detail and chrome fixtures
Walk-in closets with white built-in shelving, a brass hanging rod, and an upholstered bench nook

feature_groups.title: Everyday & Outdoor
items: Built-in home office nook with white desk, shelving, and a landscape view
Laundry room with white cabinetry, marble countertop, and integrated sink
Covered patio with wooden vaulted ceiling, fireplace, and triple-pane glass sliders
Outdoor kitchen with brick and wood cabinetry overlooking the lawn and water view

location_paragraphs: The home sits along Cypress Lake Drive in Youngsville, Louisiana, a community in the Acadiana region south of Lafayette. The setting pairs a landscaped, low-maintenance lot with open views of mature trees and water from the covered patio.

Youngsville offers a network of parks, sports complexes, and local dining within the wider Lafayette metropolitan area, with regional roadways placing the shops and services of Lafayette a short drive away.
location_points: Located on Cypress Lake Drive in Youngsville, Lafayette Parish, Louisiana
Positioned in the Acadiana region of south Louisiana
Short drive to the city of Lafayette and its shops and services
Covered patio with lawn, mature trees, and a water view
Single-family residence with an attached two-car garage
Convenient access to area parks and the greater Lafayette metropolitan area
copy.cta_sub: 107 Cypress Lake Drive is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.

media.hero_alt: Modern white two-story home with two-car blue garage doors, gray tile roof, landscaped front lawn, concrete driveway, and clear blue sky. Geometric architecture with white stucco exterior.

photos.alt: Modern white two-story home with two-car blue garage doors, gray tile roof, landscaped front lawn, concrete driveway, and clear blue sky. Geometric architecture with white stucco exterior.
Open-concept kitchen-living area with light wood cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, wood flooring, pendant lights, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking trees.

Modern bathroom with white vanity featuring marble countertop, toilet, and white subway tile shower wall. Marble tile surround, recessed shelving, and transom window above provide natural light in this minimalist all-white design.

Walk-in closet with white built-in shelving system, brass hanging rod, wood plank flooring, recessed ceiling with integrated lighting, and white trim throughout.

Bright bedroom or living space with light wood flooring, white walls and trim, multiple white-framed windows with rural views, recessed lighting, and ceiling fan.
Covered patio with wooden ceiling, white columns, concrete flooring, built-in storage, glass doors opening to lawn and water view with mature trees.

Modern home exterior with white brick facade, covered porch featuring wooden ceiling detail, white columns, black-trimmed glass doors, metal roof overhang, green lawn.
